title: cyperus lomatophyllus
intro: Cyperus lomatophyllus, also known as umbrella papyrus or umbrella sedge, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cyperus lomatophyllus include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing the throat, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
